_comment: Structured input for practical assessment/inspection service facts that the owner has NOT yet confirmed. Every value below is null until the owner supplies it; null values must never be published or paraphrased onto the page. The page generator does not read this file yet; a future milestone wires owner-approved values into build_floor_assessments.py.
publishing_rule: publish a field only when its status == 'owner_confirmed'

typical_visit_duration.note: Per-service durations may differ; record each separately if the owner provides them.

property_preparation.description: What the client should do before the visit (pets, access, parking, utilities).

furniture_and_access_expectations.description: Whether furniture must be moved, how much floor must be visible, rugs lifted, closets opened.

areas_that_must_be_accessible.description: Rooms/areas the inspection must reach to be meaningful (e.g., all wood-floored rooms, transitions, water sources).

moisture_reading_limitations.description: When moisture readings are/aren't taken and what they can/cannot establish.

destructive_access_limitations.description: Confirmation that no destructive testing/board removal occurs unless separately agreed in writing.

typical_report_delivery_range.note: Do not publish any delivery timeframe until the owner states one they can consistently meet.

client_documentation_received.description: Exactly what documents/files the client receives per service tier beyond what the page already states.

third_party_communication_limitations.description: Bounds on communicating with insurers, agents, landlords, tenants, contractors (beyond the existing written-scope language).
